name: Wicked Times
short_description: Wicked Times is an RPG manager/autobattler. Embark on a journey to stop the demon Kugraltha and his minions who occupy the lands. Collect gold. Upgrade your equipment. Find new towns and activities that give you extra experience and gold along the way. Gorgeous photos used throughout.
detailed_description:
Wicked Times is a straightforward role playing game which uses real photos to depict locations and enemies. It's a hero manager/autobattler type of game, not an action game. As you face stronger and stronger enemies you discover new towns and side activities that help you get extra gold and experience. Beg, fish, meditate and more to reach the next level or get enough gold for that new piece of gear. Stay healthy with potions. Upgrade your spell book to deal more damage and your armor to withstand the backlash of the monsters.

The game features 60 enemies, 3 final bosses, 64 locations, 6 cities and 13 side activities to strengthen yourself before facing the monsters.

Buckle up for the journey to stop the demon Kugraltha and his minions.

supported_languages: English, Italian, Spanish - Spain, French, Simplified Chinese
